name: comet
description: Perplexity Comet MCP bridge scaffold for the edgars-mcp plugin registry.

interface.shortDescription: Perplexity Comet browser delegation for research-heavy tasks.
interface.longDescription: Registers the comet-mcp bridge so edgars-mcp can hand web research and dynamic browsing tasks to Perplexity Comet instead of overloading the core coding agent.
defaultPrompt: Use Comet to research this product and summarize the findings.
Open Comet and inspect the current login flow.
Delegate browser research to Comet and return the result.
